overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077, beginning in a dimly lit indoor parking area with neon accents, transitioning through an urban underpass, crossing a sunlit plaza, and entering the Asian-inspired Foodscape market with hanging lanterns. The camera moves smoothly through these environments showcasing the game's detailed cyberpunk architecture and lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial parking garage with neon lighting

events.description: approaching bright exit from dark interior space, sunlight becomes visible at tunnel end

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through the dimly lit concrete interior toward the bright exit

entered.detail: hexagonal patterned concrete flooring with scattered debris
cyan colored fluorescent tubes mounted on concrete pillars
circular graffiti art depicting a monkey face on concrete wall
large structural support column with industrial piping
illuminated vending machine with green accent lighting

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a dimly lit concrete parking garage or service corridor. Cyan neon tube lights provide the primary illumination, casting reflections on the hexagonal floor tiles. A distinctive monkey face graffiti is visible on the left wall as the camera moves forward toward a bright exit visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban underpass roadway with graffiti walls

events.description: exits indoor parking structure into covered roadway beneath overpass
pedestrian in teal jacket walks past on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: proceeding along the sidewalk adjacent to the road, passing under the overpass structure

notable_agents.action: person in teal jacket walking in opposite direction along the wall

entered.detail: multi-lane road surface with yellow and white markings
tall concrete retaining wall covered in colorful graffiti tags
orange and silver safety barrier separating walkway from road
elevated highway or monorail track overhead with support beams
vertical light fixtures mounted on the overpass ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the parking structure into a covered roadway beneath an overpass. The left side features a graffiti-covered concrete wall with a metal railing, while vehicles pass by on the right. The lighting transitions from artificial neon to a mix of shadow and distant daylight as the camera progresses under the overpass structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza intersection with tall commercial buildings

events.description: emerges from underpass into open sunlit plaza with tall buildings
crosses the street at crosswalk, navigating around pedestrians

agents.ego_description: crossing the wide intersection while turning right toward the market entrance, navigating through pedestrian traffic

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians crossing the street in various directions

entered.detail: blue street sign with white text reading 'Farrier' mounted on pole
tall modern skyscrapers with reflective glass facades
large entry arch with red 'FOODSCAPE' signage and Asian architectural elements
large illuminated advertising screens on building facades
rectangular planter with small trees and greenery

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the underpass, the scene opens into a bright sunlit urban plaza surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers. The camera crosses the wide intersection, passing the 'Farrier' street sign and approaching the distinctive 'Foodscape' market archway. Pedestrians move through the crosswalk as the camera turns toward the market entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: Asian-inspired food market with hanging lanterns and stalls

events.description: passes under the Foodscape archway into the narrow market street
passes parked motorcycle and vendor stalls, moving deeper into the market

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow market alley, observing the stalls and architecture, passing vendors and shoppers

notable_agents.action: vendor standing near motorcycle at market entrance

entered.detail: large illuminated red sign with yellow text reading 'FOODSCAPE'
green painted traditional Asian-style buildings with wooden details
numerous red spherical lanterns hanging overhead on wires
cylindrical white lanterns with red symbols hanging between buildings
wooden vendor stalls with awnings and merchandise displays
dense network of electrical and data cables crisscrossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The camera enters the Foodscape market through the archway, transitioning into a narrow alley lined with green Asian-style buildings. Red and white paper lanterns hang overhead between the structures, creating a canopy effect. The camera moves past parked motorcycles and vendor stalls, exploring the detailed market environment with its mix of traditional architecture and cyberpunk elements like overhead wiring and neon accents.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a dimly lit, neon-soaked industrial interior into a vibrant, sunlit urban market. It begins in a concrete parking corridor illuminated by cyan neon tubes and hexagonal floor tiles, moving past monkey face graffiti toward a bright distant exit. As the camera emerges from the structure, the scene shifts into a shadowed roadway beneath an overpass where artificial light blends with distant daylight against graffiti-covered walls. The environment then opens abruptly into a wide, sun-drenched plaza surrounded by towering glass skyscrapers, crossing a busy intersection past a Farrier street sign. Finally, the camera turns through the Foodscape archway, transitioning from the open city air into a narrow alley defined by green Asian-style buildings and a canopy of red and white paper lanterns.
